rationale: Acting on Review 1 fixes the verifiable mismatch in TauCeti/Algebra/AlgebraicGroup/FunctorOfPoints.lean:169 (docstring claims `mapValue (𝟙 A)` but lemma uses `mapValue (H := H) (AlgHom.id R A)`, with 𝟙 absent from the diff and repo), which improves documentation accuracy and consistency; Review 2's approve leaves this inaccuracy, so the fixed PR is better.
